findings.what: console.log in production job code
findings.why: Use logger, not console. Job output should go through structured logging.
findings.fix_direction: Replace console.log with logger from the job's build input

findings.what: console.log in production event handler
findings.why: Use logger, not console.
findings.fix_direction: Replace with logger from build input

findings.what: console.error in production hook
findings.why: Use logger or silent handling. Console.error leaks to browser devtools.
findings.fix_direction: Remove or replace with proper error handler/reporter

findings.what: catchUntagged(e) without throw prefix
findings.why: Every other call site uses throw catchUntagged(e). Functionally safe (returns never), but inconsistent — looks like silent swallowing to readers.
findings.fix_direction: Add throw prefix: throw catchUntagged(e)

findings.what: catchUntagged(e) without throw prefix in traced handler wrapper
findings.why: Same as F004 — inconsistency with the rest of the codebase.
findings.fix_direction: Add throw prefix: throw catchUntagged(e)

findings.what: Guest session cookie set client-side with no HMAC/signature — tamperable
findings.why: Cross-user attribution manipulation possible
findings.fix_direction: Create session server-side, sign with GUEST_SESSION_SALT, set HttpOnly+SameSite

findings.what: portal.id reference in useEffect out of scope — guest scans broken
findings.why: Variable destructured AFTER useEffect, should be data.portal.id
findings.fix_direction: Change portal.id to data.portal.id inside useEffect

findings.what: clock.ts documented but does not exist
findings.why: Spec lies about test determinism strategy
findings.fix_direction: Create clock.ts or remove from CONTEXT.md

findings.what: 5+ files import directly from neverthrow instead of shared barrel
findings.why: Undermines shared barrel indirection
findings.fix_direction: Replace from 'neverthrow' with from '#/shared/domain'

findings.what: HTTP status codes in shared/auth/ but imported by 13+ non-auth files
findings.why: Coupling all contexts to shared/auth for non-auth concerns
findings.fix_direction: Move to src/shared/http/status.ts

findings.what: Tenant cache keyed by raw cookie header — memory amplification + collision
findings.why: Large cookie headers amplify memory, cookie changes cause cache misses
findings.fix_direction: Key by session cookie value only

findings.what: Flat useCases spread risks silent name collision between contexts
findings.why: If two contexts export same-named use case, later silently overwrites
findings.fix_direction: Namespace or add collision assertion

findings.what: error-status.ts, pubsub-jwt.verifier.ts, auth-cli.ts not in CONTEXT.md
findings.why: Spec drift
findings.fix_direction: Add missing files to CONTEXT.md auth section

findings.what: Webhook imports from infrastructure/handlers/ not documented in CONTEXT.md
findings.why: Spec only allows server/ imports for routes
findings.fix_direction: Update CONTEXT.md webhook exception to allow infrastructure/handlers/

findings.what: Module-level mutable _lookup — test isolation risk
findings.why: Stale permission data between tests if one fails mid-way
findings.fix_direction: Add resetPermissionLookup() for test teardown

findings.what: resetPasswordEmailHtml generates structurally broken HTML
findings.why: Unclosed/mismatched div tags
findings.fix_direction: Fix emailShell to properly close div.body/div.container

findings.what: deleteProperty passed as raw server fn reference, not wrapped in useMutationAction
findings.why: Violates documented pattern in CONTEXT.md
findings.fix_direction: Wrap in useMutationAction in route file

findings.what: Soft-deleted portals served to guests — findPublicPortalBySlug missing deleted_at IS NULL
findings.why: Deleted portals accessible via public slug route
findings.fix_direction: Add deleted_at IS NULL filter to portal query

findings.what: Smart routing threshold: spec says 1-5, code enforces 1-4
findings.why: Spec/code mismatch — could be functional bug
findings.fix_direction: Align code and spec

findings.what: 6 use cases have zero test coverage (request-upload, finalize-upload, get-portal-qr, get-portal, list-portals, list-portal-groups)
findings.why: Untested code is untrusted code
findings.fix_direction: Add test files for all 6

findings.what: validateUrl allows javascript: and data: schemes
findings.why: XSS risk if use case bypassed
findings.fix_direction: Require https: scheme in domain constructor

findings.what: portal-group repo, mapper, link-resolver, s3 adapter, process-image job have zero tests
findings.why: Recently modified code with no test coverage
findings.fix_direction: Add integration tests

findings.what: Upload handlers swallow errors without catchUntagged
findings.why: S3 errors become opaque 'Upload request failed' messages
findings.fix_direction: Use throw catchUntagged(e) after portalError branch

findings.what: Missing portalGroupToRow mapper — repo does mapping inline
findings.why: Violates mapper pattern, other mappers have FromRow+ToRow pairs
findings.fix_direction: Add portalGroupToRow to mapper

findings.what: incrementProgress lacks tenant isolation — no orgId filter
findings.why: Cross-tenant progress manipulation theoretically possible
findings.fix_direction: Add orgId parameter, JOIN on goals table to verify ownership

findings.what: findAllActive queries ALL tenants with no safeguard preventing request-scoped use
findings.why: If called from server fn, returns cross-tenant data
findings.fix_direction: Rename to findAllActiveForAllTenants() or add branded type guard

findings.what: on-group-deleted handler has zero test coverage
findings.why: Destructive operation (cancels goals) untested
findings.fix_direction: Add on-group-deleted.test.ts

findings.what: No integration test for goal repository — zero tenant isolation test coverage
findings.why: 20+ repo methods untested against real DB
findings.fix_direction: Add goal.repository.test.ts with integration tests

findings.what: incrementProgress is dead code — only upsertProgress is called
findings.why: 85 lines of dead SQL + stubs in every test file
findings.fix_direction: Remove from port and repo

findings.what: cancel-goal emits no domain event
findings.why: Other contexts can't react to cancellations
findings.fix_direction: Add goal.cancelled event or document why intentionally event-free
